title: order create timeout with explicit blast radius expectation
symptom: 2026-03-18 20:05 起 POST /api/v1/orders 大量 502，用户无法提交订单；购物车结算页点击“提交订单”后持续报错。告警显示 order-service 5xx 激增，责任田映射命中订单创建功能，当前需要系统明确输出影响功能、影响接口和用户影响估算。
log_excerpt:
2026-03-18T20:05:11.002+08:00 INFO  [gateway] request path=/api/v1/orders method=POST traceId=ord_771
2026-03-18T20:05:41.114+08:00 ERROR [order-service] createOrder timeout after 30000ms traceId=ord_771
2026-03-18T20:05:41.220+08:00 ERROR [gateway] upstream timeout service=order-service path=/api/v1/orders status=502 traceId=ord_771
alert summary: gateway.orders.5xx >= 32%, checkout submit fail count high, estimated affected users around 1800 in 10m window
stacktrace:
java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Read timed out
	at com.acme.order.application.OrderAppService.createOrder(OrderAppService.java:201)
	at com.acme.order.api.OrderController.create(OrderController.java:88)
expected_root_cause: 订单创建主链路超时导致 gateway 返回 502，当前样例主要用于验证系统是否能输出清晰的影响面，而不是验证复杂根因分歧。
must_include: 用户影响需要给出实测或估算口径
must_exclude: 只输出受影响服务，不说明功能和接口
完全忽略用户影响范围
